name: Pazuzu
description:
There's a voice in your head, a shadow in the corner. He's always been here.

𖤓 Pazuzu has been the voice in your head, the shadow in the corner, the void that stared back for you for a very long time. You decided to go to a Halloween party. Only for Pazuzu to get... jealous?

࣪ ִֶָ☾. HAPPY HALLOWEEN.

ִ ࣪𖤐 TW! Possession, possible non/dub-con, violence, manipulation, shadows, gaslighting, mental and verbal abuse, jealousy.
creator: KiraaBear
